title: Jedi courier
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:JfleetDeneba.jpg|Numerous ''Jedi couriers'' come to a [[Jedi Convocation|Jedi convocation]] at [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]]|thumb|200px|right]]
'''Jedi courier''' was the generic term used for the personal transport of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. In ancient times, each Jedi chose their own courier, choosing from any number of available classes; following the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Exar Kun War]], [[Vanya-class Jedi Courier]]s were released specifically for the purpose.

Following the [[Ruusan campaign|Battle of Ruusan]], the use of Jedi couriers fell out of favor, as Jedi forsook personal possessions and primarily relied on spaceships loaned from the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]]
